name: 16p12_1_MYH11_BP1_BP2
description: Internal MYH11 SD blocks (BP1-BP2 boundaries of the 16p12.1 recurrent deletion). Direct-orientation duplicons of MYH11 paralogous segments mediate the precise breakpoints of the 520 kb 16p12.1 recurrent CNV.

architecture.internal_structure: BP1 and BP2 SD blocks of ~50 kb at >99% identity flanking the proximal MYH11 boundary; share LCR16a duplicon core; sub-block of the larger 16p12.1 recurrent CNV interval.
